title: Single unexpected events trigger misfired days.
content:
Single unexpected events trigger misfired days.

Locked out my car in Pembroke Pines

A beggar, denied by one too many automobiles, breaks and attacks a man driving to work.


Slacker (1990) follows a single day in the life of an ensemble of mostly under-30 bohemians and misfits in Austin, Texas. The film follows various eccentric and misfit characters and scenes, never staying with one character or conversation for more than a few minutes before picking up someone else in the scene and following them.
